content_en:
* Awoman was cast into Hellfire because of a cat.*” One may utter a word carelessly, which displeases Allah. This might be done without thinking about the gravity of the word, and then because of that he will be thrown into the Hellfire, like the distance between the east and the west.” And one may obey Allah for sixty years, and at his death he misjudges, and this will be the reason for his being thrown into Hellfire. The person’s lifetime is judged by its end, and man’s actions are regarded by their final deeds. Whoever breaks his ablution before the final salutation, surely his prayer becomes invalid, and whoever breaks his fast before sunset, surely his fast is invalid, and whoever is sinful at the end of his life, surely he will meet Allah in that state. If you give charity, surely you will find the blessing thereof, but beware of greed. How many times do you seek a good reward but it is rejected because of procrastination?

* Verily, no salvation is found when faith is incomplete, when false hope is overestimated, when a disease has no remedy or visitor, when one insists on vain desires, when a sleeping heedless mind wanders blindly in wild

28 Narrated by Buhkary, in his book, “Distribution of water", the Chapter of "the merits of distributing water" no. 2365. It was narrated by Muslim, in the Book of Al-Kusdf, the Chapter of "What is offered to the Prophet....no. (904).

100 * AL-FAWA'ID: A Collection of Wise Sayings

intoxication, overwhelmed by its ignorance, feeling alienated from his Lord, and finding delight with his servants, and remembering people is his power and pleasure, while remembering Allah is his prison and death. To Allah he offers superficial acts of worship, and to people his devotion and trust are directed.

Chapter: Why Was Adam Considered the Last of Creatures?

The pen is considered the first thing to record the destiny of man before his existence. However, Adam is the last of creatures, due to several reasons:

One: Preparing the place before the dweller's arrival.

Two: Adam is the aim for which every other being is created, like the heavens, the earth, the sun, the moon, and the sea.

Three: The most proficient Creator ended His work with the best the same as He Starts with its basis and origin.

Four: Souls usually aspire to the end and final stages, and that is why Masa (Moses) told the sorcerers in the Qur'anic verse in which Allah says,

éb y AIG ail

which means, “Cast down what you want to cast!" (YGnus,

So when the people saw the sorcerers’ actions, they inclined to the following one.

Five: Allah, the Exalted and Ever Majestic, adjourned the best of books, prophets, and nations to the latest period of time. He renders the Hereafter better than this worldly life, and the final stages to be more perfect than the earlier ones, and that is why there is a great difference between the Angel's saying,

AL-FAWA'ID : A Collection of Wise Syaings * 101

"Read," to which the Prophet (peace be upon him) said, "I am not a reader," and Allah’s saying,

which means, "This day, | have perfected your religion for you." (Al-Ma'idah, 5:3)

Six: Allah, the Exalted, gave the knowledge of all things to Adam.

Seven: Adam is the essence and fruit of existence, so it is correct that he is the last of all the entities.

Eight: Because Adam is honorable in the Sight of Allah, He prepared all his interests, requirements, necessities and means of life for him. As soon as he was created, he found the universe ready for him.

Nine: Allah, the Exalted, willed that His honor and grace would be manifested over other creatures, so He preceded their creation, and that is why the Angels said, "Even if Allah creates whatever He wills, no creatures will be more honorable to Him than us." Thus, when He created Adam and He commanded them to prostrate themselves before him, the honor and grace of Allah were manifested thereon by His knowledge, however, when Adam committed the sin, the Angels thought that the honor (bestowed upon Adam) was annulled, disregarding the fact that repentance is an act of worship. When Adam turned to Allah in repentance, performing that act of worship, the Angels knew that there is a secret in Allah's creation, which is known to no one but Him, the Almighty.

Ten: When Allah, the Exalted, started the creation of the world with the pen, it was magnificent to finalize His creation with the human being. Verily, the pen is the tool of knowledge, and the human is the knowledgeable entity. Accordingly, Allan

102 * AL-FAWA'ID: A Collection of Wise Sayings

manifested the honor of Adam over the angels by virtue of the knowledge bestowed upon him.

Satan's State with Adam

We contemplate the way in which Allah, the Exalted, has written the reason beyond Adam's descent on earth, wherein He preferred and honored him, as well as that He mentioned his name before his existence by saying,

which means, "Verily, | am going to place (mankind) generations after generations on earth." (Al-Bagarah, 2:30)

We find that Allah described Adam as His vicegerent on earth before his existence, and He made the reason for his descent, by saying, "on earth." The lover used to excuse the beloved before committing his sin, so when Allah created Adam, He placed him in front of the gate of Paradise for forty years, because the lover used to stand by the beloved's door. Subsequently, Allah ordained subservience upon Adam,

which means, "He was nothing." (Al-InsAn, 76:1), in order not to feel haughty on the day in which Allah says, "Prostrate." However, Satan used to pass by Adam's body wondering, "You have been created for a certain reason." Then he used to enter Adam's body through his mouth and he used to come out through his back, saying, “If | empowered you, surely | would destroy you, but if you were to empower me, surely | would disobey you." Therein, Satan was ignorant about the fact that his destruction was at the hands of Adam. According to Satan, Adam was just pieces of clay combined together, which he despised.

AL-FAWA'ID : A Collection of Wise Syaings * 103

When the clay was shaped, envy obsessed Satan, and when Adam received his soul, the envier was shocked. Adam was granted glory, and the creatures were presented to him. The angels were the plaintiffs and protested with Allah, the Judge while Adam was the attorney. The angels admitted and regretted what they had said earlier. Allah ordered them to bow to Adam, so they did and said that they did not know. Satan stood away and did not bow because it is evil and was covered py the color of evil and protest and its evil will never be purified.

How can the one who submitted to Allah be harmed, while My Grace blesses him? Glory is compatible to him whose body is submissive. | am with them whose hearts are submissive to Me. However, sins are _ still overwhelming, until they affect the hearts, wherein the remedy was sent by the Most Kind and Courteous (to His slaves), All-Aware (of everything), illustrated by His Messengers. Allah says,

Narrated by Al-Bukhary in his Book, “Fasting”, Chapter of the Merits of Fasting, no. 1894, narrated by Abu Hurairah in these words, “The smell coming out from the mouth of a fasting person is better in the sight of Allah than the smell of musk."

104 * AL-FAWA'ID: A Collection of Wise Sayings

which means, " Then if there comes to you guidance from Me, then whoever follows My Guidance shall neither go astray, nor fall into distress and misery." (Taha, 20: 123)

Thus, the Messengers protected mankind by (divine) prohibitions, | preserved their strength by Allah's commandments, and got rid of misdeeds by means of repentance, wherein righteousness was spread everywhere.

O you who wasted his strength without reserve, and transgressed in his illness without a shield, and who has no patience to repent! Do not deny the approach of destruction, for illness will cause corruption. If you were to follow the divine remedy so as to cure yourself, by having a shield from vain desires and lusts, you will have found salvation. Unfortunately, lusts blind your insight, to the extent that you think salvation means to abandon the promise of Allah in return for vain desires. What blind insight you have! It makes you impatient for one hour then you bear disgrace forever. You travel seeking this worldly life despite its transient nature, and you neglect to prepare ‘or your journey to the Hereafter despite its eternity.

If you find a man, who is buying something worthless in return for something precious, and is selling something priceless in return for something of no value, verily he is a fool.

Chapter: Various Precious Gems

¢ When the origin of submission was manifested in Adam's nature, surely his sin was not significant.

¢ O-son of Adam! If you meet me in the state that your sins fill the earth, but not associating anything with Me, | would

AL-FAWA'ID : A Collection of Wise Syaings * 105

meet you with the same vastness of mercy and forgiveness on My Behalf.

When the Lord knew that His servant's sin was not committed on purpose, nor was done out of underestimating the wisdom of Allah, He taught him the way of turning to Him in repentance. Allah, the Exalted, says,

bBo ale OU iS 205 oye 25M ics > which means, "Then Adam received from his Lord Words.

And his Lord pardoned him (accepted his repentance)." (AlBagarah, 2:37)

By committing sins, the servant of Allah does not aim to disobey his Lord or to violate his prohibitions, but it was the result of an evil nature, the deceit of the soul and Satan, the strength of vain desires, and believing that one will be forgiven, however, according to Allah, the aim of committing sins is the reason behind passing judgments, manifesting the dignity of the Lord, and the submission of the servants, and their complete need for Allah. As well as this, the existence of the Attributes of Allah, like the Oft-Pardoning, the Oft-Forgiving, and the One Who accepts repentance, and the Clement to the repentant and remorseful. On the other hand, Allah is the Avenger, the Just, and the One with the Strongest Grasp on those who insist on disobeying. He, the Exalted, wants His servant to perceive His Perfection, and to feel absolute need of his Lord, moreover, He wants His servant to see the Perfection of His Power, Glory, Forgiveness, Mercy, and Patience, and that His Mercy is nothing but beneficence, for if Allan does not bestow His Mercy upon him, surely he will be destroyed. Estimating guilt by Allah has a great wisdom in it and a lot of benefit and mercy for that servant by offering him the way of repentance.
content_id:
* Seorang wanita dimasukkan ke dalam Neraka karena seekor kucing.* "Seseorang mungkin mengucapkan sebuah kata dengan sembarangan, yang membuat Allah tidak ridha. Hal ini mungkin dilakukan tanpa memikirkan beratnya kata tersebut, dan karenanya ia akan dilemparkan ke dalam Neraka, sejauh jarak antara timur dan barat." Dan seseorang mungkin taat kepada Allah selama enam puluh tahun, namun saat kematiannya ia salah dalam penilaian, dan inilah yang menjadi sebab ia dilemparkan ke dalam Neraka. Kehidupan seseorang dinilai berdasarkan akhirnya, dan amal perbuatan manusia dinilai berdasarkan amal terakhirnya. Barangsiapa membatalkan wudhunya sebelum salam terakhir, maka sungguh shalatnya menjadi batal, dan barangsiapa membatalkan puasanya sebelum matahari terbenam, maka sungguh puasanya batal, dan barangsiapa berbuat dosa di akhir hidupnya, maka sungguh ia akan bertemu Allah dalam keadaan demikian. Jika engkau bersedekah, niscaya engkau akan menemukan keberkahannya, namun waspadalah terhadap keserakahan. Berapa kali engkau mencari pahala yang baik namun ditolak karena sikap menunda-nunda?

* Sesungguhnya, tidak ada keselamatan ketika iman tidak sempurna, ketika angan-angan palsu terlalu dilebih-lebihkan, ketika penyakit tidak memiliki obat maupun penjenguk, ketika seseorang bersikeras mengikuti hawa nafsu yang sia-sia, ketika pikiran yang lalai dan tertidur mengembara secara membabi buta dalam

28 Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Bukhari, dalam kitabnya, "Pembagian Air", Bab "Keutamaan Membagi Air" no. 2365. Diriwayatkan oleh Muslim, dalam Kitab Al-Kusuf, Bab "Apa yang Ditawarkan kepada Nabi....no. (904).

100 * AL-FAWA'ID: Kumpulan Ucapan Bijaksana

ketersesatan, diliputi oleh kebodohannya, merasa terasing dari Tuhannya, dan menemukan kesenangan bersama hamba-hamba-Nya, dan mengingat manusia adalah kekuatan dan kebahagiaannya, sementara mengingat Allah adalah penjaranya dan kematiannya. Kepada Allah ia mempersembahkan ibadah yang dangkal, dan kepada manusia pengabdian serta kepercayaannya diarahkan.

Bab: Mengapa Adam Dianggap sebagai Makhluk yang Terakhir?

Pena dianggap sebagai hal pertama yang mencatat takdir manusia sebelum keberadaannya. Namun, Adam adalah makhluk yang terakhir, karena beberapa alasan:

Pertama: Mempersiapkan tempat sebelum kedatangan penghuninya.

Kedua: Adam adalah tujuan yang untuknya setiap makhluk lain diciptakan, seperti langit, bumi, matahari, bulan, dan laut.

Ketiga: Sang Pencipta Yang Maha Mahir mengakhiri ciptaan-Nya dengan yang terbaik, sebagaimana Ia memulainya dengan dasar dan asal-usulnya.

Keempat: Jiwa-jiwa biasanya menghasratkan akhir dan tahap-tahap terakhir, dan itulah mengapa Musa (Moses) berkata kepada para penyihir dalam ayat Al-Quran yang mana Allah berfirman,

éb y AIG ail

yang artinya, "Lemparkanlah apa yang hendak kamu lemparkan!" (Yunus,

Maka ketika orang-orang melihat tindakan para penyihir, mereka condong kepada yang berikutnya.

Kelima: Allah, Yang Maha Tinggi dan Maha Agung, menangguhkan kitab-kitab, para nabi, dan umat-umat terbaik hingga periode waktu yang paling akhir. Ia menjadikan Akhirat lebih baik dari kehidupan dunia ini, dan tahap-tahap terakhir lebih sempurna dari tahap-tahap awal, dan itulah mengapa terdapat perbedaan yang besar antara perkataan Malaikat,

AL-FAWA'ID : Kumpulan Ucapan Bijaksana * 101

"Bacalah," yang mana Nabi (shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam) menjawab, "Aku tidak bisa membaca," dan firman Allah,

yang artinya, "Pada hari ini telah Aku sempurnakan agamamu untukmu." (Al-Ma'idah, 5:3)

Keenam: Allah, Yang Maha Tinggi, memberikan ilmu tentang segala sesuatu kepada Adam.

Ketujuh: Adam adalah inti dan buah dari keberadaan, sehingga sudah tepat bahwa ia adalah yang terakhir dari semua entitas.

Kedelapan: Karena Adam adalah mulia di Sisi Allah, Ia mempersiapkan semua kepentingan, kebutuhan, keperluan, dan sarana kehidupannya untuknya. Segera setelah ia diciptakan, ia mendapati alam semesta telah siap untuknya.

Kesembilan: Allah, Yang Maha Tinggi, menghendaki agar kehormatan dan karunia-Nya termanifestasi atas makhluk-makhluk lain, sehingga Ia mendahulukan penciptaan mereka, dan itulah mengapa para Malaikat berkata, "Meskipun Allah menciptakan apa pun yang Ia kehendaki, tidak ada makhluk yang akan lebih mulia bagi-Nya daripada kami." Maka, ketika Ia menciptakan Adam dan memerintahkan mereka untuk bersujud di hadapannya, kehormatan dan karunia Allah termanifestasi di dalamnya melalui ilmu-Nya. Namun ketika Adam melakukan dosa, para Malaikat mengira bahwa kehormatan yang dianugerahkan kepada Adam telah dibatalkan, mengabaikan fakta bahwa taubat adalah ibadah. Ketika Adam berpaling kepada Allah dalam taubat dan melakukan ibadah tersebut, para Malaikat mengetahui bahwa terdapat rahasia dalam ciptaan Allah yang tidak diketahui oleh siapa pun kecuali Dia, Yang Maha Kuasa.

Kesepuluh: Ketika Allah, Yang Maha Tinggi, memulai penciptaan dunia dengan pena, sungguh agung untuk mengakhiri ciptaan-Nya dengan manusia. Sesungguhnya, pena adalah alat ilmu pengetahuan, dan manusia adalah entitas yang berpengetahuan. Oleh karena itu, Allah

102 * AL-FAWA'ID: Kumpulan Ucapan Bijaksana

memanifestasikan kehormatan Adam atas para malaikat berkat ilmu yang dianugerahkan kepadanya.

Keadaan Iblis bersama Adam

Kita merenungkan cara Allah, Yang Maha Tinggi, telah menuliskan alasan di balik turunnya Adam ke bumi, di mana Ia mengutamakan dan memuliakannya, serta bahwa Ia menyebut namanya sebelum keberadaannya dengan berfirman,

yang artinya, "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menempatkan (umat manusia) generasi demi generasi di bumi." (Al-Baqarah, 2:30)

Kita dapati bahwa Allah menggambarkan Adam sebagai khalifah-Nya di bumi sebelum keberadaannya, dan Ia menjadikan alasan penurunannya dengan berfirman, "di bumi." Sang pencinta biasa memaafkan kekasihnya sebelum ia berbuat dosa, maka ketika Allah menciptakan Adam, Ia menempatkannya di depan gerbang Surga selama empat puluh tahun, karena sang pencinta biasa berdiri di depan pintu kekasihnya. Kemudian, Allah menetapkan kerendahan atas Adam,

yang artinya, "Dia bukanlah sesuatu yang disebutkan." (Al-Insan, 76:1), agar ia tidak merasa sombong pada hari ketika Allah berfirman, "Bersujudlah." Namun, Iblis biasa melewati tubuh Adam sambil bertanya-tanya, "Engkau diciptakan untuk suatu tujuan tertentu." Kemudian ia biasa memasuki tubuh Adam melalui mulutnya dan keluar melalui punggungnya, seraya berkata, "Jika aku yang berkuasa atasmu, pasti aku akan menghancurkanmu, tetapi jika engkau yang berkuasa atasku, pasti aku akan mendurhakai engkau." Di sini, Iblis tidak mengetahui bahwa kehancurannya ada di tangan Adam. Menurut Iblis, Adam hanyalah kepingan-kepingan tanah yang tergabung bersama, yang ia pandang rendah.

AL-FAWA'ID : Kumpulan Ucapan Bijaksana * 103

Ketika tanah liat itu dibentuk, dengki merasuki Iblis, dan ketika Adam menerima rohnya, sang pendengki pun terkejut. Adam dianugerahi kemuliaan, dan para makhluk diperkenalkan kepadanya. Para malaikat adalah para penggugat yang memprotes kepada Allah, Sang Hakim, sementara Adam adalah pihak yang dibela. Para malaikat mengakui dan menyesali apa yang mereka ucapkan sebelumnya. Allah memerintahkan mereka untuk bersujud kepada Adam, maka mereka pun melakukannya dan berkata bahwa mereka tidak mengetahui. Iblis berdiri menjauh dan tidak mau bersujud karena ia adalah kejahatan, diliputi oleh warna kejahatan dan penentangan, dan kejahatannya tidak akan pernah tersucikan.

Bagaimana mungkin orang yang tunduk kepada Allah dapat dirugikan, sementara Karunia-Ku memberkatinya? Kemuliaan sesuai bagi orang yang tubuhnya tunduk. Aku bersama mereka yang hatinya tunduk kepada-Ku. Namun, dosa-dosa masih terus menguasai hingga berdampak pada hati-hati, di mana obatnya dikirimkan oleh Yang Maha Lembut dan Santun kepada hamba-hamba-Nya, Maha Mengetahui segala sesuatu, yang diilustrasikan oleh para Rasul-Nya. Allah berfirman,

Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Bukhari dalam Kitabnya, "Puasa", Bab Keutamaan Puasa, no. 1894, diriwayatkan oleh Abu Hurairah dengan kata-kata ini, "Bau yang keluar dari mulut orang yang berpuasa lebih baik di sisi Allah daripada bau kesturi."

104 * AL-FAWA'ID: Kumpulan Ucapan Bijaksana

yang artinya, "Maka jika datang kepadamu petunjuk dari-Ku, barangsiapa yang mengikuti petunjuk-Ku niscaya ia tidak akan tersesat dan tidak akan celaka." (Taha, 20:123)

Dengan demikian, para Rasul melindungi umat manusia dengan larangan-larangan ilahi, memelihara kekuatan mereka dengan perintah-perintah Allah, dan menghilangkan perbuatan buruk melalui taubat, sehingga kebenaran tersebar di mana-mana.

Wahai orang yang menyia-nyiakan kekuatannya tanpa batas, dan melanggar batas dalam sakitnya tanpa perisai, dan yang tidak memiliki kesabaran untuk bertaubat! Janganlah mengingkari datangnya kehancuran, karena penyakit akan menyebabkan kerusakan. Jika engkau mengikuti obat ilahi untuk menyembuhkan dirimu, dengan memiliki perisai dari hawa nafsu dan syahwat, niscaya engkau akan menemukan keselamatan. Sayangnya, hawa nafsu membutakan pandanganmu, sedemikian rupa sehingga engkau mengira keselamatan berarti meninggalkan janji Allah demi hawa nafsu. Betapa butanya pandanganmu! Ia membuatmu tidak sabar selama satu jam kemudian engkau menanggung kehinaan selamanya. Engkau bepergian mencari kehidupan dunia ini meskipun sifatnya sementara, dan engkau mengabaikan persiapan untuk perjalananmu menuju Akhirat meskipun ia abadi.

Jika engkau menemukan seorang pria yang membeli sesuatu yang tidak berharga dengan mengorbankan sesuatu yang berharga, dan menjual sesuatu yang tak ternilai harganya dengan mendapatkan sesuatu yang tidak bernilai, sungguh ia adalah orang yang bodoh.

Bab: Berbagai Permata Berharga

¢ Ketika asal ketundukan termanifestasi dalam sifat Adam, sungguh dosanya tidaklah besar.

¢ Wahai anak Adam! Jika engkau menemuiku dalam keadaan dosa-dosamu memenuhi bumi, namun tidak menyekutukan apapun dengan-Ku, niscaya Aku akan

AL-FAWA'ID : A Collection of Wise Syaings * 105

menemuimu dengan keluasan rahmat dan ampunan yang sama dari-Ku.

Ketika Tuhan mengetahui bahwa dosa hamba-Nya tidak dilakukan dengan sengaja, dan bukan karena meremehkan hikmah Allah, Dia mengajarkannya cara kembali kepada-Nya dalam taubat. Allah Ta'ala berfirman,

bBo ale OU iS 205 oye 25M ics > yang berarti, "Kemudian Adam menerima dari Tuhannya beberapa kalimat.

Dan Tuhannya menerima taubatnya (menerima pertaubatannya)." (Al-Baqarah, 2:37)

Dengan melakukan dosa-dosa, hamba Allah tidak bertujuan untuk mendurhakai Tuhannya atau melanggar larangan-larangan-Nya, akan tetapi hal itu merupakan hasil dari tabiat buruk, tipu daya nafsu dan setan, kuatnya hawa nafsu, dan keyakinan bahwa dirinya akan diampuni. Namun menurut Allah, tujuan di balik dilakukannya dosa-dosa adalah alasan untuk menetapkan hukum-hukum, menampakkan kemuliaan Tuhan, dan ketundukan para hamba serta kebutuhan mereka yang mutlak kepada Allah. Selain itu, adanya Sifat-sifat Allah, seperti Maha Pemaaf, Maha Pengampun, dan Yang Menerima taubat, serta Yang Penyantun kepada orang yang bertaubat dan menyesal. Di sisi lain, Allah adalah Yang Maha Membalas, Yang Maha Adil, dan Yang Maha Kuat cengkraman-Nya atas orang-orang yang bersikeras dalam kemaksiatan. Dia Ta'ala menghendaki hamba-Nya untuk memahami Kesempurnaan-Nya, dan merasakan kebutuhan mutlak kepada Tuhannya. Lebih dari itu, Dia menghendaki hamba-Nya untuk melihat Kesempurnaan Kekuasaan-Nya, Kemuliaan-Nya, Ampunan-Nya, Rahmat-Nya, dan Kesabaran-Nya, serta bahwa Rahmat-Nya tidak lain adalah kemurahan, karena jika Allah tidak melimpahkan Rahmat-Nya kepadanya, niscaya ia akan binasa. Penetapan dosa oleh Allah mengandung hikmah yang agung di dalamnya serta banyak manfaat dan rahmat bagi hamba tersebut dengan membuka baginya jalan taubat.
content_ar:
* Awoman was cast into Hellfire because of a cat.*” One may utter a word carelessly, which displeases الله. This might be done without thinking about the gravity of the word, and then because of that he will be thrown into the Hellfire, like the distance between the east and the west.” And one may obey الله for sixty years, and at his death he misjudges, and this will be the reason for his being thrown into Hellfire. The person’s lifetime is judged by its end, and man’s actions are regarded by their final deeds. Whoever breaks his ablution before the final salutation, surely his prayer becomes invalid, and whoever breaks his fast before sunset, surely his fast is invalid, and whoever is sinful at the end of his life, surely he will meet الله in that state. If you give charity, surely you will find the blessing thereof, but beware of greed. How many times do you seek a good reward but it is rejected because of procrastination?

* Verily, no salvation is found when faith is incomplete, when false hope is overestimated, when a disease has no remedy or visitor, when one insists on vain desires, when a sleeping heedless mind wanders blindly in wild

28 Narrated by Buhkary, in his book, “Distribution of water", the Chapter of "the merits of distributing water" no. 2365. It was narrated by Muslim, in the Book of Al-Kusdf, the Chapter of "What is offered to النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم....no. (904).

100 * AL-FAWA'ID: A Collection of Wise Sayings

intoxication, overwhelmed by its ignorance, feeling alienated from his Lord, and finding delight with his servants, and remembering people is his power and pleasure, while remembering الله is his prison and death. To الله he offers superficial acts of worship, and to people his devotion and trust are directed.

Chapter: Why Was Adam Considered the Last of Creatures?

The pen is considered the first thing to record the destiny of man before his existence. However, Adam is the last of creatures, due to several reasons:

One: Preparing the place before the dweller's arrival.

Two: Adam is the aim for which every other being is created, like the heavens, the earth, the sun, the moon, and the sea.

Three: The most proficient Creator ended His work with the best the same as He Starts with its basis and origin.

Four: Souls usually aspire to the end and final stages, and that is why Masa (Moses) told the sorcerers in the Qur'anic verse in which الله says,

éb y AIG ail

which means, “Cast down what you want to cast!" (YGnus,

So when the people saw the sorcerers’ actions, they inclined to the following one.

Five: الله, the Exalted and Ever Majestic, adjourned the best of books, prophets, and nations to the latest period of time. He renders the Hereafter better than this worldly life, and the final stages to be more perfect than the earlier ones, and that is why there is a great difference between the Angel's saying,

AL-FAWA'ID
